title: Dubbele kloof zorgt voor extra druk op logistiek vastgoed
summary: De invoering van de zero-emissie zones zal de druk op logistiek Nederland alleen maar doen toenemen. Dit vraagt om meer samenwerking om goederenstromen naar de stad te bundelen.

title: The Feminist City
summary: In onze serie 'Feminist City' belichtten we verschillende perspectieven van vrouwen in steden en hoe stedelijke planning, stedelijk bestuur en kantoorinrichting vrouwen beter kunnen ondersteunen in hun dagelijks leven.

title: Overzicht Value of a City Insights
summary: In de serie 'Value of a City' geven wij maandelijks onze visie op een onderwerp dat te maken heeft met de waarde van de stad. Deze visie komt tot stand vanuit intern onderzoek en dialoog met interne en externe stakeholders, in nauwe samenwerking met consultants en analisten uit ons Real Estate Strategy & Innovation team.

title: Logistics Real Estate in France: Market Update
summary: In our Marketbeats and Flashs, we cover French logistics markets and sub-markets quarterly. We analyze KPIs and dimensions in the market.

title: Office Real Estate MarketBeat in Lyon Region
summary: The Office Marketbeat Lyon Region analyses the activity of commercial real estate in Lyon region in the office sector, taking into account supply, take-up and transactions across markets and submarkets.

summary: Marketbeat Investissement market reports analyse activity in the French property investment market, taking into account volumes committed across all asset types

title: Hotel property in Paris and the Ile-de-France region
summary: Discover the analysis of the hotel real estate market in Paris and Île-de-France for the 1st half of 2024. Focus on major transactions, international investors and the outlook for 2025 in an attractive and fast-changing sector.

title: Kinetic Energy - UK Real Estate and the wider implications of the Iran conflict
summary: The US–Israeli military campaign against Iran that began on 28th February and the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz have removed millions of barrels of daily supply from the market. On 9th March 2026, Brent crude spiked to $119.50 per barrel, the first time oil had traded above $100 since Russia’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022.

title: Irish Student Accommodation Review
summary: Explore the outlook for demand and supply for student beds and rents together with the improving investment backdrop for the student segment.

title: Sind Gasheizungen jetzt wieder ok?
summary: Am Dienstag, den 24. Februar 2026, haben die Regierungsparteien ein Eckpunktepapier zur Novelle des Gebäudeenergiegesetzes (GEG) veröffentlicht. Das Gesetz wird in „Gebäudemodernisierungsgesetz“ (GMG) umbenannt. Was ändert sich hierdurch für Investoren und Mieter und mit welchen Preisänderungen ist zu rechnen?

title: Data Centres in Belgium: A growing hub for technology
summary: As technology continues to evolve and permeate both consumer and business landscapes in Belgium and globally, the interest in data centres has surged.
